Comment: EventBridge rule pattern for GuardDuty findings — routes MEDIUM and HIGH severity (>= 4) to both SNS and Lambda simultaneously

Rule.Name: guardduty-high-severity-response
Rule.Description: Routes GuardDuty findings with severity >= 4 to SNS alerting and Lambda auto-remediation

Targets.Description: SNS topic — delivers full JSON finding payload to analyst email
Lambda function — auto-remediates HIGH severity findings (>= 7)

SeverityScale.LOW: 1-3 — informational, logged only, not routed by this rule
SeverityScale.MEDIUM: 4-6 — notable, triggers SNS alert + Lambda logging (no destructive action)
SeverityScale.HIGH: 7-10 — critical, triggers SNS alert + Lambda auto-isolation of compromised EC2
